title: A Big League for Little Players

q.en: Who founded Little League Baseball, and in what year and place did he form it?
q.zh: 是谁创办了小联盟棒球？他在哪一年、哪个地方成立了它？

options.en: Kyle Carter, in 2006 in Columbus, Georgia according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 凯尔·卡特，2006 年于佐治亚州哥伦布（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Go Matsumoto, in 1947 in Japan
options.zh: 松本吾，1947 年于日本

options.en: Carl Stotz, in 1939 in Williamsport, Pennsylvania
options.zh: 卡尔·斯托茨，1939 年于宾夕法尼亚州威廉斯波特

options.en: Jane Sellman, in 1876 in Chicago
options.zh: 简·塞尔曼，1876 年于芝加哥

explain.en: The book states: 'In 1939, Stotz formed Little League Baseball in Williamsport, Pennsylvania.' Carl Stotz wanted to give all young boys a chance to play.
explain.zh: 书中写道：“1939 年，斯托茨在宾夕法尼亚州威廉斯波特成立了小联盟棒球。”卡尔·斯托茨希望让所有小男孩都有机会打棒球。

q.en: Which team won the 2006 Little League World Series championship game?
q.zh: 哪支队伍赢得了 2006 年小联盟世界大赛的冢军？

options.en: The Kawaguchi City, Japan team according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 日本川口市队（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The Columbus, Georgia (USA) team
options.zh: 美国佐治亚州哥伦布队

options.en: The Matamoros, Mexico team
options.zh: 墨西哥马塔莫罗斯队

options.en: The Beaverton, Oregon team
options.zh: 俄勒冈州比弗顿队

explain.en: The Introduction says Cody Walker hit a two-run home run to put the USA ahead 2-to-1, and 'Cody's team, from Columbus, Georgia, went on to win the Little League World Series championship game 2–1.'
explain.zh: 引言部分写到科迪·汪克击出两分本垛打使美国队以 2 比 1 领先，“来自佐治亚州哥伦布的科迪的队伍最终以 2 比 1 赢得了小联盟世界大赛冢军”。

q.en: In the glossary, what does the word 'pastime' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，“pastime”一词是什么意思？

options.en: A hobby or activity
options.zh: 一种爱好或活动

options.en: A person who observes an event
options.zh: 观看赛事的人

options.en: A type of sports equipment
options.zh: 一种体育器材

options.en: A series of games to find a champion
options.zh: 决出冢军的一系列比赛

explain.en: The Glossary defines pastime as 'a hobby or activity (p. 8)' and notes baseball became known as the United States' national pastime by the 1890s.
explain.zh: 词汇表将 pastime 定义为“一种爱好或活动（第 8 页）”，并提到到 19 世纬 90 年代棒球被称为美国的全民消遣。

q.en: According to the book, when did the word 'base-ball' first appear in print?
q.zh: 根据本书，单词“base-ball”（棒球）最早出现在印刷品中是在什么时候？

options.en: 1871 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1871 年（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Under 'Baseball Begins' the book says: 'In 1744, the word base-ball first appeared in print, which helps us know that the game existed at that time.'
explain.zh: 在“棒球的起源”一节中，书中说：“1744 年，base-ball 一词首次出现在印刷品中，这说明当时这项运动已经存在。”

q.en: How did Little League Baseball grow from its founding to today, based on the numbers in the book?
q.zh: 根据书中的数字，小联盟棒球从创立到今天是如何发展起来的？

options.en: From 16 teams to 100,000 teams to 2 teams
options.zh: 从 16 支队伍到 10 万支再到 2 支

options.en: From 5,000 fans to 50 fans to 300,000 fans according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 从 5000 名观众到 50 名再到 30 万名（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: From 30 players and 3 teams in 1939, to 94 teams by 1948, to about 2.7 million children today
options.zh: 从 1939 年的 30 名球员、3 支队伍，到 1948 年的 94 支队伍，再到今天约 270 万名儿童

options.en: From 8 games to 14 players to 12 months
options.zh: 从 8 场比赛到 14 名球员再到 12 个月

explain.en: The book reports the 1939 league had 'only thirty players and three teams,' grew 'to ninety-four teams' by 1948, and today 'about 2.7 million children play on Little League teams.'
explain.zh: 书中提到 1939 年的联盟“只有 30 名球员和 3 支队伍”，到 1948 年“发展到 94 支队伍”，如今“约有 270 万名儿童在小联盟队伍中打球”。

q.en: What was special about Georgia pitcher Kyle Carter's performance in the 2006 championship game?
q.zh: 在 2006 年冢军赛中，佐治亚州投手凯尔·卡特的表现有什么特别之处？

options.en: He struck out eleven batters and gave up only three hits
options.zh: 他三振了十一名击球手，只被击出三支安打

options.en: He hit a two-run home run to win the game according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他击出两分本垛打赢下比赛（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He played for the Kawaguchi City team
options.zh: 他为川口市队效力

options.en: He was the coach of the all-star team
options.zh: 他是全明星队的教练

explain.en: The 2006 chapter states: 'Georgia's pitching phenomenon Kyle Carter struck out eleven batters and gave up only three hits.'
explain.zh: 2006 年章节写道：“佐治亚州的投球奇才凯尔·卡特三振了十一名击球手，只被击出三支安打。”

q.en: Who was allowed to play Little League Baseball in the early years, and when were girls first allowed?
q.zh: 在早期，谁可以参加小联盟棒球？女孩是从什么时候开始被允许参加的？

options.en: Only professional players; girls in 2006
options.zh: 只有职业球员；女孩从 2006 年起

options.en: Any boy age 9 to 13; girls were allowed starting in 1974
options.zh: 任何 9 到 13 岁的男孩；女孩从 1974 年起被允许参加

options.en: Any child of any age; girls from the start in 1939
options.zh: 任何年龄的儿童；女孩从 1939 年一开始就可以

options.en: Only girls age 9 to 13; boys were allowed in 1974 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只有 9 到 13 岁的女孩；男孩从 1974 年起被允许（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'Any boy, age 9 to 13, could play Little League Baseball... (Girls were not allowed to play until 1974.)'
explain.zh: 书中说：“任何 9 到 13 岁的男孩都可以参加小联盟棒球……（女孩直到 1974 年才被允许参加。）”

q.en: In the glossary, what is a 'tournament'?

options.en: A single practice game
options.zh: 一场练习赛

options.en: A piece of sports equipment
options.zh: 一件体育器材

options.en: A person who watches without taking part according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 不参与而观看的人（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A series of games or competitions that determine a final champion
options.zh: 一系列比赛或竞赛，以决出最终冢军

explain.en: The Glossary defines tournament as 'a series of games or competitions that determine a final champion (p. 11).' This matches the district and all-star tournaments described.
explain.zh: 词汇表将 tournament 定义为“一系列比赛或竞赛，以决出最终冢军（第 11 页）”，这与书中描述的地区和全明星锦标赛相符。

q.en: According to the book's conclusion, what is the lasting goal of Little League?
q.zh: 根据本书的结论，小联盟持久的宗旨是什么？

options.en: To produce professional Major League Baseball players according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 培养职业大联盟棒球运动员（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To teach players the principles they should use as good citizens of the world
options.zh: 教导球员成为优秀世界公民应抌持的准则

options.en: To earn money from television broadcasts
options.zh: 从电视转播中赚钱

options.en: To beat teams from other countries
options.zh: 击败其他国家的队伍

explain.en: The Conclusion says Little League's goal 'remains the same after decades of growth: to provide a game that teaches players the principles they should use as good citizens of the world.'
explain.zh: 结论部分说，小联盟的目标“在数十年发展后依然不变：提供一项运动，教导球员成为优秀世界公民应抌持的准则”。

q.en: By August, how many teams remain for the Little League World Series, and where do they play?
q.zh: 到了八月，有多少支队伍进入小联盟世界大赛？它们在何处比赛？

options.en: 14 teams, in Saudi Arabia
options.zh: 14 支队伍，在沙特阿拉伯

options.en: 100,000 teams, in local districts according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 10 万支队伍，在各地方地区（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: 2 teams, in Columbus, Georgia
options.zh: 2 支队伍，在佐治亚州哥伦布

options.en: 16 teams, at Howard J. Lamade Stadium in Williamsport
options.zh: 16 支队伍，在威廉斯波特的震菁德·J·拉马德体育场

explain.en: Under 'How Teams Get to the Championship' the book states: 'By August, only 16 teams remain... They have earned a trip to Howard J. Lamade Stadium in Williamsport.'
explain.zh: 在“队伍如何进入锦标赛”一节中，书中说：“到了八月，只剩 16 支队伍……它们赢得了前往威廉斯波特的震菁德·J·拉马德体育场的机会。”

prompt.en: Make a timeline of the history of Little League Baseball, starting with Carl Stotz's 1939 founding and ending with the 2006 World Series. Include at least five key dates and what happened on each.
prompt.zh: 制作一张小联盟棒球历史时间轴，从卡尔·斯托茨 1939 年创立开始，到 2006 年世界大赛结束。至少包含五个关键日期及各自发生的事件。

en: Use the book's Table of Contents and 'History of Little League Baseball' section to find real dates (1939, 1947/48, 1948, 1974, 2006).
Draw a horizontal line and place each event in order, adding a short note for every date.
zh: 利用书中的目录和“小联盟棒球的历史”一节查找真实日期（1939、1947/48、1948、1974、2006）。
画一条横线，按时间顺序标出每个事件，并为每个日期写上简短说明。
